User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Block admin and auth pages from indexing
Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /login
Disallow: /register
Disallow: /reset-password
Disallow: /verify-email
Disallow: /dashboard
Disallow: /calculator
Disallow: /rewards
Disallow: /credit-score
Disallow: /connect-bank

Sitemap: https://clavirafinance.com/sitemap.xml
